Before they started, I asked them if it was just going to be a few nails and a little bit of debris that would be falling b/c I had stuff back on my back patio that could be damaged, and they had they're trailer in the front yard for the shingles that came off the roof.

When they started dumping all the shingles and nails into my garden bed and I noticed,.. I was like, whoa whoa.. STOP!
I let them know that they were dropping shingles in my garden and on top of my privacy screen.
I did all the work to put this screen up myself to make it look presentable and did a really good job it took me HOURS! I also built the raised garden bed with my own w hands.

Then, I asked where their supervisor was b/c instead of throwing the crap in the trailer, I could clearly hear them pushing it off the roof onto my back patio.

The safety I felt with the guarantee of their craft has worn off with repeated call and emails for repairs to the shingles blowing off and the leaks. They began to filter my calls. My husband wanted to give them another chance and was going to have them install some ice guards , but they never showed up and never called back. I am now stuck with no help, a damaged "New" roof, water damage, and we are disabled ( one of us even in a wheelchair). I am at a loss for what to do, but I no longer recommend them. Will update if they reply ( it has been months).

Original 5 star review:
I got quotes from many different places and Sooper Roofer was one of the few that gave an item list break down for the project in their quote. They didn't sales pitch me or compare themselves to other companies by bad mouthing. They communicated everything with respect and clarity. That same communication was always available so I could ask questions. They did not expect anything but the least I could do was get them some food and drinks for lunch, but even then they were very careful with their time and worked hard. (I do recommend always having drinks and food available for any construction or manual labour workers!) My roof looks amazing, to the point my house looks newer and I know this roof will last. Their workmanship warranty is something I feel safe with as I know if anything comes up Sooper Roofers will be here at a moments notice to see that their work is maintained. They really take pride in their work and you can see why. They also took so much care to clean up, I watched them go over my yard many times with their magnet and gloved hands. I highly recommend if you are thinking of getting any roof done, get a quote from sooper roofers. Also, Derek is very easy to work with and so respectable that I am a bit sad I won't get to chat with him more. I am sure you will come to adore them as much as I did! Stefano is also a great role model for any young person who’s wanting to start their own small business. I’m so impressed with this guy, how he keeps it all together with such a large team. It’s so rare to see young guys, doing the right thing all the time and having work ethic like yours nowadays.
